samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_8bit">
    <description>Implement an 8-bit multiplier based on shifting and adding.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="A" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input operand A (multiplicand).</input>
        <input id="B" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input operand B (multiplier).</input>
        <output id="product" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit output for the product.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter>shifts[3:0]</parameter> <!-- size=4, values=[0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7] -->
        <parameter>add[7:0]</parameter> <!-- size=8, values=[0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7] -->
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="i">0</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="shifts" width_description="[3:0]">0</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="add" width_description="[7:0]">0</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="product" width_description="[15:0]">0</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <sequential>
            <assign>
                <lhs>i</lhs>
                <rhs>1</rhs>
            </assign>
            <if>
                <condition>
                    <equal>
                        <expr>i</expr>
                        <expr>8</expr>
                    </equal>
                </condition>
                <then>
                    <assign>
                        <lhs>i</lhs>
                        <rhs>0</rhs>
                    </assign>
                </then>
                <else>
                    <assign>
                        <lhs>shifts[3:0]</lhs>
                        <rhs>
                            <concat>
                                <expr>shifts[2:0]</expr>
                                <expr>0</expr>
                            </concat>
                        </rhs>
                    </assign>
                    <assign>
                        <lhs>add[7:0]</lhs>
                        <rhs>
                            <concat>
                                <expr>add[6:0]</expr>
                                <expr>shifts[3]</expr>
                            </concat>
                        </rhs>
                    </assign>
                    <assign>
                        <lhs>product[15:0]</lhs>
                        <rhs>
                            <add>
                                <expr>product[14:0]</expr>
                                <expr>
                                    <conditional>
                                        <condition>
                                            <equal>
                                                <expr>B[7]</expr>
                                                <expr>shifts[3]</expr>
                                            </equal>
                                            <true>
                                                <expr>A</expr>
                                            </true>
                                            <false>
                                                <expr>0</expr>
                                            </false>
                                        </condition>
                                    </conditional>
                                </expr>
                            </add>
                        </rhs>
                    </assign>
                    <assign>
                        <lhs>i</lhs>
                        <rhs>add[7]</rhs>
                    </assign>
                </else>
            </if>
        </sequential>
    </implementation>
</module>
